hero.heading: Student applications now live!
hero.body_lg: The world's biggest Ethereum conference returns – thousands of Students can join us in Mumbai, India from 3–6 November 2026.
hero.body: Not a student? Follow us or subscribe to our newsletter to be the first to hear about our global ticket launch (hint: it's in May)

overview.heading: Overview
overview.body: Tickets to Devcon India will be distributed through three different methods:

sale_waves.heading: Sale waves
sale_waves.body_lg: General Admission tickets to Devcon will be distributed via waves, beginning with our Global Early Bird launch in May.
sale_waves.body_suffix: to purchase a general admission Devcon India ticket. Follow us on socials or subscribe to our newsletter to stay updated!

community.heading: Community
community.body_lg_strong: Early Access vouchers for Indian residents
community.body_lg_suffix: have now ended. Thank you to everyone who reserved their place at Devcon.
community.body_middle: – no application required, just verify your eligibility and purchase directly. Tickets are

applications.heading: Applications
applications.body_lg_suffix: and International student applications are now open! Supply is limited so apply early to secure your Devcon ticket.
